markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire after the event occurs.
markets.no_sub_title: Julio Rodríguez: 6+
markets.rules_primary: If Julio Rodríguez records 6+ total bases in the Cleveland vs Seattle professional baseball game originally scheduled for Mar 26, 2026 at 10:10 PM EDT, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
Player Participation & Settlement Criteria
If Julio Rodríguez is scratched or not included in the starting lineup, the market will resolve to the last fair price.
If Julio Rodríguez starts the game but does not record a plate appearance, the market will resolve to the last fair price.
If Julio Rodríguez is not in the starting lineup but later enters the game, the market will resolve to the last fair price, pinch hit at bats will not count towards the market.
If Julio Rodríguez is in the starting lineup and records at least one plate appearance the market will settle based on total bases recorded.

markets.no_sub_title: Julio Rodríguez: 1+
markets.rules_primary: If Julio Rodríguez records 1+ home runs in Cleveland vs Seattle professional baseball game originally scheduled for Mar 26, 2026 at 10:10 PM EDT, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
Player Participation & Settlement Criteria
If Julio Rodríguez is scratched or not included in the starting lineup, the market will resolve to the last fair price.
If Julio Rodríguez starts the game but does not record a plate appearance, the market will resolve to the last fair price.
If Julio Rodríguez is not in the starting lineup but later enters the game, the market will resolve to the last fair price, pinch hit at bats will not count towards the market.
If Julio Rodríguez is in the starting lineup and records at least one plate appearance the market will settle based on home runs recorded.
